title: Software Developer
//_comment: HERO: Focuses on potential, growth, and enthusiasm.
summary: Versatile Software Developer with a growing skill set across web and mobile platforms. As an IT Software Development student, I am building a solid foundation in backend technologies like Java, Spring Boot, and C# .NET, while actively learning to build dynamic interfaces with React. I am also exploring mobile app development using Swift and Kotlin. I am eager to tackle new challenges, learn best practices, and grow as a professional within a collaborative team.
//_comment: ABOUT: Focuses on the academic journey and transferable soft skills.
bio: I am currently completing my diploma in IT Software Development at NBCC, where I have dedicated myself to mastering the fundamentals of software development across both web and mobile platforms. My academic projects have given me hands-on experience with the full software lifecycle, from architecting robust backends and databases to building dynamic web interfaces and native mobile applications.

Before transitioning into tech, I gained valuable experience in team leadership and operations. These roles taught me the importance of clear communication, adaptability, and reliability. These are qualities I am excited to bring to a development team as I continue to learn and evolve in this field.

I am currently seeking practicum and entry-level opportunities, and I am open to local, remote, and relocation options. I am the developer who reads the documentation before asking, refactors before moving on, and treats every code review as a learning opportunity.
